## Summary

- 

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is small and scoped to the stated problem.
- [ ] No unrelated rewrite or mass formatting.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated, or the reason they were not is documented.
- [ ] Build passes locally or known failures are documented.
- [ ] Analyzers/formatting pass locally or known findings are documented.
- [ ] Public contracts are unchanged or intentional changes are documented.
- [ ] Logging does not expose secrets, tokens, personal data, or sensitive business data.
- [ ] Complexity, file size, method size, and parameter count remain reasonable.
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` standards were followed or intentional deviations are documented.
